description_long: This is an oversized, fantasy-style sword with a massive, broad blade that is nearly rectangular in shape, tapering only slightly to a pointed tip. The blade is predominantly black with a metallic sheen, bordered by a silver or steel-colored edge, and features a few engraved or inlaid lines on one side. The hilt is relatively short compared to the blade, with a cylindrical, dark red handle and a simple, round pommel. The guard is thick and rectangular, appearing to be made of metal with some brownish accents, possibly wood or leather, for grip or decoration. The overall design is reminiscent of iconic swords from video games or anime, intended more for visual impact than practical use. This sword would be a striking object if found in an urban environment, likely as a display piece or prop.
description: A massive, rectangular black sword with a silver edge, engraved lines, and a short red handle with a thick metal guard. The design is bold and fantasy-inspired, featuring both metallic and decorative elements.
description_view_0: The broad, flat face of the blade is visible, showing the engraved lines and the full rectangular guard with brown accents.
description_view_1: The sword is seen from the side, highlighting the blade's thickness and the sharp, pointed tip.
description_view_2: A top-down view reveals the sword's long, straight profile and the alignment of the blade with the handle.
description_view_3: The front of the blade is prominent, displaying the engraved lines and the robust construction of the guard and handle.
attribute_blade_type: straight, oversized, single-edged, rectangular, pointed tip
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, dark red, straight, simple round pommel, possible leather or wood grip
attribute_ornamentation: engraved lines on blade, brown accent on guard
